# abnormalia

> Ixens, Iams (autobiographies) and other abnormalia. Self-contained mixed-media pages, creative writing, and technical apparitions.

Abnormalia has lived several incarnations: from an Amiga DiskMag to a social apparition, from experimental web projects to a collection of Ixens — self-contained mixed-media pages inspired by the original I, Xen by Alvagante (2005).

## Content

- [Home](https://abnormalia.com/): Site overview and intro.
- [I. Xen (original, 2005)](https://abnormalia.com/i-xen/): The original I, Xen by Alvagante.
- [Ixen archive](https://abnormalia.com/ixen/): All published Ixens.

- [Privacy policy](https://abnormalia.com/privacy/): GDPR notice. Operated by Lab42 Srl (IT03677180121).
- [Cookie policy](https://abnormalia.com/cookies/): Cloudflare technical cookies only.
